name: ai-olive-video
description: AI in Everyday Life - Olive Oil Example

scripts.render: npx remotion render AIVideo out/video.mp4 --browser-executable="C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft\Edge\Application\msedge.exe"
scripts.render:reels: npx remotion render AIVideo out/reels.mp4 --codec h264 --crf 18 --pixel-format yuv420p --browser-executable="C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft\Edge\Application\msedge.exe" --log quiet
scripts.render:tiktok: npx remotion render AIVideo out/tiktok.mp4 --codec h264 --crf 20 --pixel-format yuv420p --browser-executable="C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft\Edge\Application\msedge.exe" --log quiet
scripts.render:draft: npx remotion render AIVideo out/draft.mp4 --codec h264 --crf 28 --scale 0.5 --browser-executable="C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft\Edge\Application\msedge.exe"
scripts.render:all: npm run render:reels && npm run render:tiktok
